assertions.assertion: Output registers AddStackExchangeRedisCache with a Redis connection string for the distributed L2 cache tier
assertions.rationale: AddStackExchangeRedisCache is called with Configuration from builder.Configuration.GetConnectionString("Redis").

assertions.assertion: Output sets CacheLifetimeBuffer to 120 in the AddClientCredentialsTokenManagement options
Output implements IHybridCacheSerializer<ClientCredentialsToken> using IDataProtector for encryption
assertions.rationale: Implements an IDistributedCache wrapper for encryption instead of the v4-correct IHybridCacheSerializer<ClientCredentialsToken>.

assertions.assertion: Output registers the custom serializer via AddHybridCache().AddSerializer<ClientCredentialsToken, ...>()
assertions.rationale: Does not call AddHybridCache().AddSerializer<>(); uses an IDistributedCache wrapper pattern instead.

assertions.assertion: Output calls AddDataProtection() to enable the data protection provider
